topic: Functioning of Parliament and State Legislature
rationale: Covers the constitutional basis, types, and proclamation of emergency, along with major amendments (38th, 39th, 42nd, 44th) that reshaped the emergency framework.

topic: Functioning of Parliament and State Legislature
subtopic: Assent to State Bills and Governor's Powers
rationale: Focuses on Articles 200 and 201 regarding the Governor's and President's roles in state bills, including discretionary powers and judicial review.

subtopic: Vice-President and Speaker of Lok Sabha
rationale: Details the election, qualifications, and removal of the Vice-President and the duties and election of the Speaker and Deputy Speaker.

topic: Functioning of Parliament and State Legislature
rationale: Covers the 10th Schedule, judicial interpretations (Lily Thomas, etc.), and the proposed 130th Amendment Bill for removal of ministers.
Discusses the Estimates Committee, Consultative Committees, and the Cabinet Committee on Security (CCS).

subtopic: Model Youth Gram Sabha and Official Language
rationale: Combines the MYGS initiative for local governance and the constitutional provisions for the Official Language.

subtopic: Finance, Money and Private Member Bills
rationale: Compares Finance and Money Bills and explains the mechanism for Private Member Bills.
Covers types of questions in Parliament and the National e-Vidhan Application (NeVA) for digitization.
Detailed coverage of the Lokpal's genesis, composition, selection committee, and its inquiry and prosecution wings.
Covers Lokpal's jurisdiction, the CBI's legal status and state consent, and the constitutional framework of the UPSC.
Focuses on the functions of the NCRB and the 2023 report on accidental deaths and suicides.
Covers NHRC's accreditation (GANHRI), its statutory basis, powers, and functions.
Discusses NSCSTI 2.0, the Capacity Building Commission, and Mission Karmayogi.

subtopic: CAG and Attorney General of India
rationale: Details the appointment, tenure, and duties of the CAG and the Attorney General.
Covers the National Commission for Scheduled Castes and the structure of the National Medical Commission.
Explains the constitutional safeguards and laws (NSA, UAPA, etc.) related to preventive detention.
Discusses personality rights, phone tapping safeguards, and the constitutional validity of narco-analysis tests.
Covers the right to digital access under Article 21 and the safeguards for civil servants under Article 311.

subtopic: Chief Justice and Appointment of Judges
rationale: Explains the appointment of the CJI, the Collegium system, and the removal process for judges.

subtopic: Subordinate Courts, Tribunals and Legal Aid
rationale: Covers Additional/District Judges, the evolution of the tribunal system, and constitutional provisions for legal aid.
Details types of Alternative Dispute Resolution and the statutory status and powers of Lok Adalats.
Explains the concept of Zero FIR and the new e-Zero FIR initiative for cybercrimes.
Covers the ECI's functions, registration of political parties, and the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls.

subtopic: CEC Appointment Act and Postal Ballot
rationale: Details the 2023 Act for CEC/EC appointment and the eligibility and framework for postal ballots.
Discusses the federal scheme, legislative powers, and the judicial precedents on state reorganisation.
Covers the distribution of revenue, Finance Commission recommendations, and the framework for resolving inter-state water disputes.
Detailed look at the DPDP Act 2023 and the 2025 Rules, including data fiduciary obligations and the Data Protection Board.
Summarizes key changes in the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita and Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita.
Covers the new online gaming regulations and the National Sports Governance Act 2025.
Details the structure of national sports bodies and the targets and initiatives under the National Education Policy 2020.
Covers the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act and the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act.
Discusses the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act and the key highlights of the Waqf (Amendment) Act 2025.
Covers the framework for the 2027 digital census and the features and statutory basis of Aadhaar.
Details the eligibility for OCI cards and the consolidation of laws under the Immigration and Foreigners Act 2025.
Discusses land registration systems and digital initiatives like ULPIN and the SVAMITVA scheme.
Compares the 5th and 6th Schedules and explains the PESA Act and tribal development missions.
Covers the Tribal Village Vision 2030, Adi Karmayogi Abhiyan, and the Forest Rights Act 2006.
Details the Juvenile Justice Act 2015, the 2021 amendments, and the role of CARA in adoption.

subtopic: Online Content and Global Gender Gap
rationale: Covers the regulation of obscene content on OTT platforms and India's performance in the Global Gender Gap Index 2025.
Discusses the Global Hunger Index 2025, SOFI 2025, and UNICEF's Child Nutrition Report.
Covers the Maternity Benefit Act and the status of literacy in India according to PLFS 2023-24.
Details the Swachh Survekshan 2024 results, the Swachh Shehar Jodi initiative, and the Global Tobacco Epidemic report.
Discusses UN mechanisms for global AI governance and the Visakhapatnam Declaration on e-governance.
Covers the Performance Grade Index (PGI) 2.0 and the MERITE scheme for technical education.
Details the Universal Immunization Programme (UIP) and the management of stray dogs in India.
Compares NRI, PIO, and OCI statuses and traces the historical evolution of civil services in India.
Summarizes key health indicators like U5MR, Sex Ratio at Birth, TFR, and Life Expectancy.
